subcodes.first_line: O true friend! Thy letter was received and thy purpose became manifest. Thou seekest new triumph and victory, and divine confirmation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوست حقیقی نامه تو رسید و مقصود پدید گردید فتح و نصرت جدید میطلبی و بر عون
subcodes.subjects: @rendering assistance to God; victory [nusrat], @spiritual transformation, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
